description.zh: BGM / 音效工作台 · 搜索 + 试听音频素材库,一键配入游戏:下载到 .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ 并写入 audio/manifest.json,供引擎按 manifest 播放。
description.en: BGM & SFX workbench — search and preview an audio asset library, then attach to a game in one click: downloads into .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ and upserts audio/manifest.json for the engine to play.

description.zh: 在 Local 库搜索 BGM(kind=bgm)/音效(kind=sfx),按 tag 匹配。返回 { assetId, name, kind, version, resUrl } 列表,供 attach-audio 使用。
description.en: Search the Local depot for BGM (kind=bgm) / SFX (kind=sfx) by tag. Returns { assetId, name, kind, version, resUrl } for attach-audio.

description.zh: 把一条 BGM/音效下载到 .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ 并 upsert 到 audio/manifest.json(按 assetId 幂等)。assetId/resUrl/name/version 取自 search-audio,勿编造。slug 必填。
description.en: Download a BGM/SFX into .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ and upsert audio/manifest.json (idempotent by assetId). Fields from search-audio; slug required.

description.zh: 读取 .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/manifest.json,返回已配入的 BGM/音效清单。slug 必填。配 audio 前先调它,避免重复附加。
description.en: Read .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/manifest.json — the attached BGM/SFX list. slug required. Call before attaching to avoid duplicates.

description.zh: (SPA 专用)Local 音频库原始只读透传:FindAssetMeta/HybridSearch/Search。仅人用面板调用。
description.en: (SPA only) raw read-only passthrough to the Local audio library (FindAssetMeta/HybridSearch/Search).
